name: Contentful
description: Contentful is a headless CMS that provides content infrastructure for digital platforms. Use this API to retrieve content entries, assets, and content types from your Contentful spaces with powerful search and filtering.

capabilities.name: get_entries
capabilities.description: Retrieve content entries with filtering, full-text search, and linked content resolution.

capabilities.name: get_entry
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single content entry by its ID.

capabilities.name: get_assets
capabilities.description: Retrieve media assets (images, videos, files) from a space.

capabilities.name: get_content_types
capabilities.description: Retrieve the content model (content types and their fields).

capabilities.name: search_content
capabilities.description: Perform full-text search across all content in a space.
